variants: Tayseer Ghannam resides in Laurelmorn Rise, where he has established a successful career in design. A native of Skydrop Township, his innovative spirit led him to create the Elemental Pulse Engine, which earned him the renowned Lucid Chronicle Prize. Currently, he applies his talents at Lilac Compass Design, contributing to a variety of projects that showcase his creativity. Tayseer’s achievements reflect his dedication and influence in the field of design.
